body:
## Summary
- add focused badge/XP runtime validation for malformed badge counters and XP inputs
- reject non-boolean runtime answer correctness before mutating progress
- normalize mock-exam completion counts before awarding completion XP

## Verification
- `NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' node --test --test-name-pattern 'badge|XP|recordAnswer|mock exam completion XP|progression' tests/content-badge-catalog-schema.test.js tests/content-xp-rules-parity.test.js tests/content-progress-schema-parity.test.js scripts/learning.test.js`
- `NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' node scripts/validate-content.js --focus-badge-xp-runtime`
- `NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' node scripts/validate-content.js --focus-progress-schema-parity`
- `NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' npm run validate:content`
- `NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' npm run typecheck -- --pretty false`
- `git diff --check`
title: fix: guard badge and XP runtime inputs
